body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/12751872?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Crypto-Cat", "id": 12751872, "login": "Crypto-Cat", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEyNzUxODcy", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Crypto-Cat", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55790", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "## Summary An attacker with only a GitHub account can plant a JavaScript payload in a `craftcms/cms` issue title. When a Craft admin uses the CraftSupport widget’s "Give feedback" screen and types a search term that returns the poisoned issue, the payload executes in the admin’s control panel session. No control panel account or elevated privileges are required on the attacker’s side. ## Preconditions - Attacker has a GitHub account (no control panel access needed). - Victim is an administrator, and you have the CraftSupport widget on the dashboard. - Victim uses the "Give feedback" screen and types a search term that returns the poisoned issue. ## Root cause `CraftSupportWidget.js` lines 382-392: ```js $('', { href: this.getSearchResultUrl(results[i]), target: '_blank', html: '' + this.getSearchResultText(results[i]), }) ``` `FeedbackScreen.getSearchResultText` (line 669-671) returns `result.title` verbatim from the GitHub API response. The jQuery `html:` option sets the element’s `innerHTML`, so a title containing `` executes immediately on render. The GitHub API returns issue titles as raw JSON strings with no HTML encoding. The widget makes this request directly from the browser, without a Craft proxy or any sanitization step. `HelpScreen` (Stack Exchange) is not affected because the Stack Exchange API HTML-encodes titles before returning them. ## Steps to reproduce **Plant (attacker, GitHub account only):** 1. Open `https://github.com/craftcms/cms/issues/new`. 2. Set the title to a string combining a plausible search term and the payload, e.g.: ``` cannot upload files ``` 3. Submit the issue. **Trigger (victim, Craft admin):** 1. Open the Craft control panel dashboard. 2. Open the CraftSupport widget, click "Give feedback". 3. Type `cannot upload files` in the search box. 4. `alert(document.domain)` fires in the admin's session. ## Impact XSS in the admin control panel session. The payload has access to `Craft.csrfTokenName` and `Craft.csrfTokenValue` and can send same-origin action requests as the admin without any further interaction. ## Mitigating factors - Victim must actively use the "Give feedback" search screen. - Attacker must predict or social-engineer a search term the admin will type, or use a broad term likely to match. - Widget is only available to admins. ## Resources https://github.com/craftcms/cms/commit/6bbb66038a268552180ca5c8eed9f46ea25a4417", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00311, "percentile": 0.22879}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-24x4-j6x9-rfw5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-06T21:29:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-24x4-j6x9-rfw5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-24x4-j6x9-rfw5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55790"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-01T23:16:52Z", "published_at": "2026-07-06T21:29:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/craftcms/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-24x4-j6x9-rfw5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-55790", "https://github.com/craftcms/cms/commit/6bbb66038a268552180ca5c8eed9f46ea25a4417", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-24x4-j6x9-rfw5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/craftcms/cms/security-advisories/GHSA-24x4-j6x9-rfw5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/craftcms/cms", "summary": "Craft CMS: DOM XSS via GitHub issue title in CraftSupport widget", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T21:29:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-24x4-j6x9-rfw5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.9.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0-RC1, < 5.9.22"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.17.16", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0-RC1, < 4.17.15"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Craft CMS: DOM XSS via GitHub issue title in CraftSupport widget
